zh.lifeSummary: 當Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES於1121年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德哈盧易時，她的父親Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin42歲，母親Gustine d'Avesnes35歲。她和Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1172年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES于1121年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德哈盧易时，她的父亲Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin42岁，母亲Gustine d'Avesnes35岁。她和Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1172年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jehanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joanne
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES was born in 1121, in Halluin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, was 42 and her mother, Gustine d'Avesnes, was 35. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing. She died in 1172, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES est née en 1121, à Halluin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Gustine d'Avesnes, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing. Elle est décédée en 1172, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES 1121 in Halluin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin 42 und ihre Mutter Gustine d'Avesnes 35. Sie hatte mit Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1172 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES è nata il nel 1121 nel Halluin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Gustine d'Avesnes, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing. Morì nel 1172, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNESが1121年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードハルインで生まれた時，父Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluinは42歳，母Gustine d'Avesnesは35歳であった。彼女はGerard I de Forest de Lalaingとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1172年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES(이)가 1121년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 핼루인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gustine d'Avesnes(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1172년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES nasceu em 1121, em Halluin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Gustine d'Avesnes, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing. Ela faleceu em 1172, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES родилась в 1121 г. в местности холлуин, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Gustine d'Avesnes, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing. Она умерла в 1172 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jehanne DE HALLEWYN-D'AVESNES nació en 1121, en Halluin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Gustine d'Avesnes, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Gerard I de Forest de Lalaing. Murió en 1172, a la edad de 51 años.
